chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Transfer Application No.S-139 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 9108/17 2. For orders on M.A 8952/17 3. For orders on M.A 8953/17 4. For Katcha Peshi. 08.12.2017. Mr. Altaf Hussain Chandio, Advocate for applicants. 1. Urgency Granted. 2to4. By means of this application, the applicants, who are accused, are seeking transfer of Sessions Case No.62/2017, Re: State Vs. Paryal and others from the Court of learned District and Sessions Judge, Tharparkar @ Mithi to any other District and Sessions Court on the ground that one Mubarak Ali, who is father of P.W Abdul Rehman, is posted as Stenographer in the court of District and Sessions Judge, Tharparkar @ Mithi. Therefore, they are not expecting a fair decision. The transfer of a case cannot be justified on the said ground as mere relationship of some employee in the given District and Sessions Court with one P.W would not mean that the decision on merit would not be made by the learned Presiding Officer and he would be influenced by the presence of such employee. This transfer application is misconceived, and therefore, is dismissed in limine alongwith listed application at serial Nos’.2 and 3. JUDGE Ali Haider
